title: Junior Product Manager
description: Palantir Technologies, the data analytics company trusted by governments and enterprises, seeks a Junior Product Manager for our LA office. You'll own product features, work with engineering and design, and influence how organizations make better decisions with data. This high-impact role offers mentorship from Palantir's experienced PM leadership.
responsibilities: Define product requirements and user stories for assigned features
Conduct user research and gather customer feedback
Work with engineers and designers to bring products to market
Analyze product metrics and drive data-informed decisions
Participate in product roadmap planning and prioritization
Present product updates and strategy to stakeholders

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in any field; technical background preferred

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
